regime_read: ES & NQ moving together — broad agreement, more DURABLE directional signal. Trust the direction more.
narrative:
PRE-US-OPEN BRIEFING — ES/NQ (research only; no CME execution path here).

1) RECENT MOVE-BY-MOVE READ
Both indices are in a clear up-leg. ES last 7596.5 (+2.17% day, +2.43% week) and NQ 30601.25 (+3.17% day, +3.89% week) — both printing fresh highs above prior-day and prior-week highs and trading well above their respective session VWAPs (ES 7556.21, NQ 30487.87). The dominant catalyst appears geopolitical risk-off unwind: the cluster of Iran headlines (draft US deal with nuclear limits, Strait of Hormuz reopening, $25B asset release) is a textbook de-escalation/peace-premium that pulls a war/oil risk premium OUT of equities — supportive of a melt-up, and the slightly larger NQ pop fits a duration/long-tech relief bid as feared-tail risk fades. The counterweight in the tape: an INFLATION-tagged poll item flagging climbing fuel/food prices and energy-dividend stories — a soft reminder that the inflation narrative hasn't fully cleared, which matters with FOMC two days out. Net: momentum is up, RSI mid-50s on both (53.5 / 54.6) — trending, NOT overbought, so there's room without a stretched-tape warning.

2) VOLUME-PROFILE READ (volume-at-price, NOT order-flow delta — respect that)
Important caveat: this is WHERE volume traded over 5 days, not buy/sell aggression. ES POC sits at 7306.33 with a value area 7279.23–7432.80; NQ POC 28794.91 with VA 28621.67–29661.06. Price has decisively LEFT and is trading ABOVE the entire 5-day value area on both — current prices (ES ~7596, NQ ~30601) are at/above the top of the 5-day range (ES range top 7599.92, NQ 30613.83). That means there is essentially NO accepted volume shelf above us; this is low-volume-node, breakout territory — fast in both directions. The accumulation zone / line in the sand on a pullback is value-area-high: ES ~7432, NQ ~29661, with POC the deeper magnet far below. Practically, the nearer structural line that matters today is session VWAP — holding above it keeps the breakout honest.

3) NQ/ES LEAD-LAG REGIME
Regime = BREADTH. Contemporaneous correlation 0.95, best lag at 0 (corr 0.897), no clean leader, divergence=false. ES and NQ are moving together — broad agreement, which makes the directional signal more DURABLE and more trustworthy than a concentration/single-engine move. No rotation warning. Implication: you can trust the UP direction more than usual and this argues for normal-to-modestly-confident sizing on the directional read — BUT see section 4, because the event calendar caps how much that trust should translate into size.

4) EVENT-CALENDAR AWARENESS
FOMC is in 2 DAYS (2026-06-17) — this is the governing constraint. Standard discipline: reduce size / widen stops into the window. With an unresolved inflation sub-narrative in the news, the meeting is a genuine two-way risk and the worst place to be max-long into. Further out and lower priority: PCE (~Jun 30), ISM Mfg (~Jul 1), NFP (~Jul 3) — all cadence ESTIMATES, treat as approximate. Bottom line: directional thesis is fine, but FOMC proximity should HALVE conviction-to-size; don't carry oversized risk into the print.

5) SYNTHESIS — META-REGIME + NARROWED BIAS
Meta-regime: durable BREADTH up-trend (corr 0.95, both above 200-SMA — ES +9.9%, NQ +18.4%) + a genuine geopolitical de-risking catalyst, in breakout/low-volume-node air, BUT into a 2-day FOMC window with a lingering inflation tail. That combination = real directional edge, capped confidence. Signals are mostly aligned (clean lead-lag, supportive news) which justifies a LONG lean; the FOMC proximity and the fact that price is in unaccepted territory above all value keep me from high conviction.

BIAS: LONG (long-the-strength / buy-the-VWAP-hold), ~58%, INVALIDATED below NQ session VWAP 30487 (loss of VWAP flips this to neutral; sustained trade back into the 5-day value area, i.e. below ~29661, kills the breakout thesis entirely). For ES the analog invalidation is loss of ~7556 VWAP.

HUMILITY / STATUS: This briefing is INTELLIGENCE, not a validated edge. My own scorecard is n=4 (dir hit 1.0 on tiny sample, regime accuracy only 0.375) — that is CALIBRATING and statistically meaningless until ~30-60 samples. Size from your own risk rules, not from this confidence number, and respect the FOMC size-down.
